query:
-- The 9 unmatched SasBoss Voice services have no customer name and no service ID
-- They appear to be Smile IT internal/demo UCXcel seats and blank entries
-- Assign them to Smile IT (C9003 = primary Smile IT record with businessName set)
UPDATE services SET 
  customerExternalId = 'C9003',
  customerName = 'Smile IT',
  status = 'active'
WHERE externalId IN ('SS1NJNTP', 'SSL0OO3Q', 'SSQ16U1I', 'SSWDCLAW', 'SSORVHG1', 'SS4HTBPC', 'SSWJNY05', 'SSNHX6ZD', 'SS011MSO')
  AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');
